         "question":"What is the primary purpose of the SELECT statement in SQL?",
         "format":"mcq",
         "concept":"SELECT Statement",
         "options":[
            "To insert new data into a table",

            "To retrieve specific data from a table",

         "difficulty":"easy",
         "explanation":"The SELECT statement is used to retrieve specific data from a table based on conditions specified in the WHERE clause."

         "question":"What is the difference between the HAVING and WHERE clauses in SQL?",

         "explanation":"The HAVING clause is used to filter groups of data based on conditions, while the WHERE clause is used to filter individual rows of data."
